name: Auto-ingest New Source Document
description: When a file is saved to data/sources/, upload it to the wiki and trigger ingest

action.prompt:
A new source file was just saved at: {{file.path}}

Do the following:
1. Determine the source type from the file extension (pdf, txt/md → text, docx → text).
2. Upload the file to the Context API:
   POST /api/v1/workspaces/$WS_ID/sources
   Multipart: file=<file contents>, title=<filename without extension, spaces instead of hyphens>
   Header: Authorization: Bearer $CONTEXT_API_TOKEN
3. From the response, take the source 'id'.
4. Trigger ingest:
   POST /api/v1/workspaces/$WS_ID/ingest
   Body: {"source_ids": ["<id>"]}
5. Report: 'Ingest job <job_id> queued for <filename>. Poll GET /api/v1/workspaces/$WS_ID/ingest/<job_id> for status.'
